title: AngularSpectrumSettings
description: Settings for the Angular Spectrum propagation task.

lambda.description:
Wavelength in meters. Must satisfy:
- lambda > 0

dx.description:
Pixel pitch along X in meters. Must satisfy:
- dx > 0
- dx == dy

dy.description:
Pixel pitch along Y in meters. Must satisfy:
- dy > 0
- dy == dx

z.description: Propagation distance in meters. Positive values propagate forward; negative values back-propagate.

filter.description:
Optional bandlimiting filter expressed in pixels. Must satisfy:
- r_inner >= 0
- r_outer >= r_inner
- s_inner >= 0
- s_outer >= 0

r_inner.description:
Radius where attenuation starts. Must satisfy:
- r_inner >= 0

r_outer.description:
Radius where attenuation reaches zero. Must satisfy:
- r_outer >= r_inner

s_inner.description:
Slope width inside the passband. Must satisfy:
- s_inner >= 0

s_outer.description:
Slope width outside the passband. Must satisfy:
- s_outer >= 0
